emails.subject: Kaminski Column
emails.body: Kaminski Column Good Morning, Vince! Don't forget that I'll need a column from you for this week's newsletter. Thank you! Sam

emails.subject: Re: Kaminski Column
emails.body: Re: Kaminski Column Sam I asked Maureen to write on my behalf. Vince --------------------------vince kaminski

emails.subject: RE: Kaminski Column
emails.body: RE: Kaminski Column Vince, I just got it from Maureen. Thank You! Will we establish a precedent here? Perhaps we should get the VP's to take their turn? Sam To: Smith, William
